text: For the builders: XOlokun ships with a full SDK in SDK/include/xolokun/. JUCE-free headers. Build your own engine, plug it in. KnotTopology included. github.com/XO-OX
notes: Good for r/gameaudio, r/DSP, audio dev communities

text: Thursday deep listen: find a preset in the Entangled mood. Play it slowly. Then fast. Notice what the coupling changes at different tempos. That's Amp->Pitch at work.
notes: Instructional but experiential — not a tutorial

text: 🌊 Every engine in XOlokun has a character. The coupling gives them a relationship. What character are you drawn to today? #XOlokun
notes: Light engagement post, points at engine identity

text: Guru Bin says: ERA Portamento at 0.5–1.5 seconds transforms instant vertex switches into slow morphs. Combined with ERA drift, the triangle becomes a living creature.
notes: Thursday is good for deeper posts — community has warmed up by midweek
